[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]

And wound up at your door[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
  I’ve had you so many times but somehow[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
I want more[/tab]

And she will be loved[/tab]

And she will be loved[/tab]
